message.content:
I can see the bug clearly. Line 164 has `{s:'q',d:'[a-z_]'}` with lowercase 'q' - matching black queens instead of white queens. My earlier fix didn't apply correctly to this section. Let me fix it directly:

```json
{
  "analysis": "Line 164 still has lowercase 'q' for Queen source pattern. My earlier fix didn't match correctly. Need to directly replace the specific line in gen.py.",
  "plan": "Fix the Queen section in gen.py to use uppercase Q for the source pattern. Also check Bishop and Rook sections.",
  "commands": [
    {"keystrokes": "python3 << 'DEBEOF'
with open('/app/gen.py') as f:
    c = f.read()

# Just do a global replace of s:'q' to s:'Q' in bld calls only
# But we must NOT affect check detection patterns which use 'q'
# The move gen lines all look like: bld({s:'q',d:'[a-z_]'...
old = "s:'q',d:'[a-z_]'"
new = "s:'Q',d:'[a-z_]'"
count = c.count(old)
c = c.replace(old, new)
print(f'Replaced {count} occurrences of queen source pattern')

with open('/app/gen.py', 'w') as f:
    f.write(c)
DEBEOF
", "duration": 0.3},
    {"keystrokes": "python3 /app/gen.py 2>&1 | tail -3
", "duration": 120}
  ]
}
```
